'''''Oriflamme''''' was the personal [[Imperial-class Star Destroyer/Legends|''Imperial''-class Star Destroyer]] of [[Grand Admiral/Legends|Grand Admiral]] [[Octavian Grant]]. He presumably handed it over to the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] when he defected in [[6 ABY/Legends|6 ABY]].

==Behind the scenes==
[[Daniel Wallace]] originally named the ''Oriflamme'' in a segment of his Grand Admirals article that was cut. It was eventually officially named such in the first part of the blog series "The Imperial Warlords: Despoilers of an Empire," focusing on the various warlords active after the death of Palpatine. In the real-world, [[Wikipedia:Oriflamme|Oriflamme]] is the symbol of the [[Wikipedia:Saint Denis Basilica|Abbey of St.-Denis]] in Paris.
